infra_failed_rate_eq_0.basis: normalized follow-up source of truth; model-output search/replace contract failures are invalid_submission, not infra_failed

verifier_repair_after_live_eq_false.basis: task-003 verifier pre-import repair happened before live follow-up calls; no verifier repair was made after those calls

unclassified_failure_rate_lte_20pct.basis: all failed or invalid cells have report-level film labels

all_runs_have_clean_patch_replay.basis: frontier-click-specialist task-003 attempt 1 and attempt 2 were scoreable invalid_submission outcomes without a verifier-ready patch to replay

frontier_click_specialist_attempt1_compl.basis: tasks 001 and 002 passed; task 003 produced a model-output invalid_submission

meaningful_film_contrast_exists.basis: task 003 separates API-plumbing verifier failures, a frontier-generic pass, and frontier-click search/replace contract failures

decision.stop_reason: Gate 1 requires every scoreable stabilization result to be produced by clean patch replay. Two frontier-click-specialist task-003 cells consumed provider responses but failed the model-output search/replace contract before producing a patch.

notes: The stop is not an API quota, credential, or repository-auth blocker.
The stop is not an infrastructure-failure-rate blocker; normalized status treats these cells as model-output invalid submissions.
Use the corrected fill evidence artifact, normalized artifacts, and the gate decision as source of truth; the original fill batch and task-003 batch_run_result are stale non-scoring audit outputs.
